title: elaeocarpus subvillosus
intro: Elaeocarpus subvillosus is a species of flowering plant in the family Elaeocarpaceae, commonly known as the velvet staff tree or staff tree. The plant has been traditionally used in medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties. Elaeocarpus subvillosus is known to provide various health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving coughs and colds, and soothing skin irritations. The herbal preparations of Elaeocarpus subvillosus include tea, infusions, and decoctions, which can be made by steeping the leaves or bark in hot water, allowing for the extraction of its medicinal compounds.
